rationale: Learning states (type: learning, FEAT-1283) currently render with the shell fallback glyph because _ACTION_TYPE_BADGES has no learning key. The alembic glyph (U+2697) signals distillation/proof-of-substance, matching the learning state's prove-before-build role. Add 'learning': '⚗' to _ACTION_TYPE_BADGES and extend _get_state_badge() to consult state.type for the learning fallback.
rule: Captured: Add learning state badge glyph to _ACTION_TYPE_BADGES using ⚗ (U+2697) alembic
